{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Genesis (hammer) appearance
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red]] and blue lines trail in the air behind the hammer when it is turned.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
